ko: 한 글자씩 정확하게 따라 쓰며 연습해요
en: Practice by tracing each character precisely
Write falling characters quickly and accurately

ko: 글자를 알아볼 수 없어요. '{0}'를 다시 써볼까요?
en: I couldn't recognize the character. Want to try writing '{0}' again?
That looks like '{1}' instead of '{0}'. Want to try again?

ko: 잠시 후 다시 시도해 주세요. (초기화 중)
en: Please try again in a moment. (Initializing)
Firebase not configured (requires the FIREBASE_ENABLED symbol)
Password must be at least 6 characters.

ko: 아주 잘 쓰셨어요! (지금은 서버 연결이 원활하지 않아 자동으로 통과 처리했어요)
en: Great job! (We couldn't reach the AI right now
Tracing evaluation only supports a single character.
There's no writing. Try writing a character in the box?
This looks more like '{1}' than '{0}'. Want to try again?

ko: 획을 이어서 쓰신 것 같아요. 한 획씩 또박또박 써볼까요? (약 {0}획)
en: It looks like you joined strokes together. Try writing each stroke separately? (about {0} strokes)

ko: 획 수가 너무 많아요. 차분히 다시 써볼까요?
en: Too many strokes. Want to try again slowly?

ko: 선이 많이 구불거려요. 천천히 곧게 그어볼까요?
en: The lines are quite wobbly. Try drawing them slowly and straight?

ko: '{0}'의 획 방향이 반대예요. 가로는 왼쪽→오른쪽, 세로는 위→아래로 그어볼까요?
en: The stroke direction for '{0}' is reversed. Try drawing horizontal strokes left→right and vertical strokes top→bottom?

ko: '{0}'의 획 순서가 표준과 달라요. 위에서 아래, 왼쪽에서 오른쪽 순서로 써볼까요?
en: The stroke order for '{0}' differs from the standard. Try writing top-to-bottom, left-to-right?
This looks different from '{0}'. Try writing it neatly again?

ko: 획이 너무 많아요 ({0}획 — '{1}'는 {2}획). 또박또박 다시 써볼까요?
en: Too many strokes ({0} strokes — '{1}' should be {2}). Try writing it neatly again?
